claim_boundary.gate4b_close_requires: A repository implementation gate followed by a complete independently inspected Termux result archive.
claim_boundary.not_proved_by_design: No transition implementation, upgrade, downgrade, mixed-version runtime behavior, migration, or target recovery behavior is proved.
claim_boundary.proved_by_design: The exact two-product path delta, non-reopening whole-product transition policy, and sixty-six-scenario bidirectional validation matrix are internally consistent.

policy.active_product_identity: derive from the exact runtime-base artifact ID and frozen authority mapping; verify the target product lock as an input, do not install a separate mutable product lock
policy.implementation_boundary: new transition coordinator may import frozen durability/common helpers but must not modify the frozen Phase 4 engine files, registry schema, artifact manifests, or archive bytes
policy.journal: use the frozen schema-2 mutation vocabulary and recovery-compatible PREPARED/APPLYING/COMMITTED states with operation=transition
policy.lock: reuse the frozen exclusive installation lock
policy.modified_owned: reject before mutation; transition never discards or silently carries modified owned content
policy.operation: dedicated whole-product transition; ordinary artifact install is same-product only

path_plan.owner_transfer: unsupported and absent in this authority pair

recovery.committed: finalize exact target and clean transaction
recovery.precommit: restore exact source and retain one ROLLED_BACK tombstone

policy.registry: retain frozen schema version 1; atomically replace the registry with the exact target artifact tuple
policy.source_precondition: exact recognized frozen product with exact owned payload and no outstanding transaction
policy.topology: preserve the installed artifact set across the transition
policy.unowned_descendant: preserve unchanged unless it collides with a target-owned path

scenarios.error_contains: source artifact tuple is not a frozen authority
registry combines artifact IDs from different products
transition preserves the installed artifact set
transition preserves the installed artifact set

scenarios.expected_result: remove all; no stale source path
scenarios.subject: source-only-exact-paths

scenarios.expected_result: remove all; no stale source path
scenarios.subject: source-only-exact-paths

assertions: active product derived from runtime artifact ID

target_evidence_requirements: fresh exact extraction of both product authorities
